name: ai-plugins
description: A multi-harness marketplace of AI coding-assistant plugins for Claude Code, Codex, and other harnesses that support the plugin concept.

plugins.name: worktrees
plugins.description: Make a repository worktree-ready: per-worktree isolation plus an enforcement guard that protects the main checkout.

plugins.name: engineering-standards
plugins.description: John's standard engineering regime as a reusable, stack-agnostic starting point for any serious project.

plugins.name: agentic-systems-engineering
plugins.description: Portable guardrails for building, evaluating, and delivering LLM and agentic systems.

plugins.name: eval-case-reporter
plugins.description: Capture sanitized eval cases from bad or borderline AI-assistant behavior and submit them to this marketplace.

plugins.name: babysit-pr
plugins.description: Babysit a pull/merge request to completion across GitHub, Forgejo, and GitLab.
